errors.invalidResult: Oh no! You announced an invalid result. There's chaos in the playing hall! Please announce either "Yuki", "Ando" or "tie".
errors.wrongResult:
Oh no! You announced the wrong result. There's chaos in the playing hall!

You should have announced `"{{expected}}"` but you announced `"{{got}}"`.

describers.announceResult: announced the result of the game as ${arg1}
